LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT, INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $10,236.15 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT HEARS ARGUMENT OF MR. LEE. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY K. LEE'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $500.00 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. AND RELEASE THE BALANCE OF EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. $0.00 (ZERO DOLLARS) PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE WITHHELD BY THE EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,385.23 AS TO RESPONDENT LEE, TIMOTHY K
